generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor attached to the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor input to measure motor current."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the motor shaft to provide joint angle information."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the cycloidal gearbox output to provide joint angle information."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque at the joint calculated from motor current and gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity computed from motor position over time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration calculated from angular velocity changes."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink motor model representing the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink gearwheel model used to emulate gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink cycloidal gearbox model used to reproduce drive characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SystemSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Combined Simulink model of motor, gearwheel, gearbox, and axis operating in the range -90° to +90°."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink for real‑time identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used within the Simulink simulation to capture velocity‑dependent effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model incorporated to simulate stick‑slip behavior in the joint."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model employed for accurate friction representation across operating regimes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink processing component that consumes sensor traces and generates new traces based on simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService,
                     MotorGearboxSimulationService,
                     DataAggregationVisualizationService,
                     FrictionParameterProvisionService
]

instance MQTTTelemetryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT client that ingests telemetry streams from the robot’s sensors."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell instance that provides metadata and lifecycle information for the first axis."
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time identification of friction using Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterDerivationInsight,
                     LossEstimateInsight
]

instance MotorGearboxSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates the motor, gearwheel, gearbox, and system dynamics in MATLAB Simulink."
]

instance DataAggregationVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates telemetry data and displays a real‑time comparison of simulation versus measured data on a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides identified friction parameters to the plant controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControllerParameterUpdateRecommendationInsight,
                     ModelUpdateFeedbackInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterDerivationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derivation of friction parameters and loss estimates from real‑time identification."
]

instance LossEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimation of losses due to friction within the joint."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of simulation versus measured data."
]

instance ControllerParameterUpdateRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation for controller parameter updates based on identified friction models."
]

instance ModelUpdateFeedbackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Feedback potential to feed updated friction models back into the motion controller."
]

instance UpdateControllerParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates controller parameters in the plant controller using identified friction model values."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FeedUpdatedFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feeds the updated friction model back into the motion controller to refine control performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxisComponent, PMSMSMotor, InitialGearbox, CycloidalGearbox,
                   MotorEncoderComponent, GearboxEncoderComponent, RobotAASAsset,
                   SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTTelemetryEnabler, AASEnabler,
                   RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, MotorGearboxSimulationService,
                   DataAggregationVisualizationService, FrictionParameterProvisionService
]

instance FirstAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX‑100 industrial robot, operating from -90° to +90° at up to 75°/s."
]

instance PMSMSMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis."
]

instance InitialGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Initial gear transmission preceding the cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing high‑torque, high‑accuracy motion for the axis."
]

instance MotorEncoderComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor shaft encoder providing joint angle measurements."
]

instance GearboxEncoderComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox output encoder for joint angle measurements."
]

instance RobotAASAsset : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for the first axis of the MABI MAX‑100 robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous identification; the digital shadow updates friction models continuously as the robot operates, without any intentional lag."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow comprising a schematic engineering model (SysML), simulation models (Simulink), a processing component that executes those models, sensor data streams (MQTT), and an Asset Administration Shell representing the robot; all orchestrated to deliver diagnostics and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Lifecycle covers the design phase where engineering models (SysML structural model, Simulink simulation models) are created, a manufacturing phase where the physical robot already exists, and an operation phase where the digital shadow runs continuously during robot operation, continuously updating friction models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point back to its generating processing component; use of analytical (white‑box) and data‑driven (black‑box) friction models; continuous real‑time identification compensates for wear and temperature changes; explicit coupling of simulation and measured data ensures model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data transmitted over MQTT; asset administration shell may use other protocols but not specified; thus the only documented protocol is MQTT."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The study follows SysML, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards, and uses MathWorks MATLAB/Simulink as the modeling/simulation environment."
]
